name: Number 89: Diablosis the Mind Hacker
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｎｏ．</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ナンバーズ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>８９ <ruby lang="jp"><rb>電</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>でん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>脳</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>のう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>獣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ディアブロシス
name_jp_tl: Numbers 89: Diablosis the Electronic Mind Beast<!-- Yes, Dennō can indeed mean Cyber, but we prefer using the closest translation to the TCG name that can be still considered accurate over the hyper-literal or most obvious one. Please stop changing it -->
desc:
2 Level 7 monsters
Once per turn: You can detach 1 material from this card; look at your opponent's Extra Deck and banish 1 monster from it, face-down. At the end of the Battle Phase, if this card destroyed a monster by battle: You can target 1 card in your opponent's GY; banish it, face-down. If a card your opponent owns and possesses is banished face-down while you control this card (except during the Damage Step): You can banish cards from the top of your opponent's Deck, face-down, equal to their face-down banished cards. You can only use this effect of "Number 89: Diablosis the Mind Hacker" once per turn.

action: Activates if it destroys a monster by battle
Activates if other cards are banished
summoning: Does not require specific Xyz Materials
banished: Banishes from your opponent's Extra Deck
Banishes from the top of your opponent's Deck
